name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 28 Oct 2022
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Improvement","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Upgraded password requirements to enforce stronger passwords be used and additional enforcement against allowing commonly used passwords."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Fixes"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where different areas of the printed order template were referencing different pricing values. This could lead to incorrect tax values being calculated and displayed, especially on tax exclusive orders."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
